sources.source: …or type / paste here (your name works too — non-amino letters are dropped)
(tap a discovered dance to perform it)
💥 POP! You blew past full. A new balloon appears.
A balloon that inflates as you blow
A brightness reading is the least of it. With real camera access, a site could:
A challenger shared their balloon run. Can you beat it?
A cool aura that got TOO much rest. It only knows how to clap.

A duel of two slimy duelists. Pick solo (vs a Sleepy, Average, or Sigma slug) or send a friend a link. Slide up and down, tap to lunge, and win the match to make your slug ascend into a confetti-soaked sigma champion.
A fair fight. Shadows you and strikes when lined up.
A friend's octopus lived this life
A gentle squeeze. The chicken tolerates this.
A global leaderboard ranks the apps by how often they are visited and poked.
A grown octopus needs a fortress. Gather shells and wall up your den.
A loudness meter is the least of it. With raw microphone access, a site could work out:
A modest little scream. Barely a squeak.
A new blade has grown back. Nature heals. 🌱
A notification permission is a permanent hook back to you. With it, a site can:
A playable nature documentary. You will hatch, hunt, hide, love, and die — the whole short, strange life of an octopus in a few minutes. Most never reach adulthood. Can you?
A rubber chicken you can squeeze. Hold to compress, release to hear it scream. The deeper the squeeze, the bigger the scream.
A scream heard by every chicken on Earth. Magnificent.
A shared shelf awaits further judgment.

A suite of gloriously pointless browser mini-apps: translate text to emoji, touch virtual grass, squeeze a screaming chicken, commune with god, paint potatoes, fence with slugs, blow up balloons with your voice, and play as a shelf-smashing cat.
A timeless truth echoes through the browser.
A warm aura overdosed on sunlight. Pure kinetic showing off.
A web page can't revoke its own permissions — only your browser can. To fully take it back:
AAAAAAAAAA. The chicken screams back to shape.
Add some amino acids below to compose a song.
Advertisers rarely know who you are — they bid on profiles. Here's a mock auction for yours, scaled by the signals brokers actually price on. Grant more above and watch it climb.
AI-powered apps such as Emoji Translator and Commune with God send your input to a language model and return a playful response.
An estimated household income and net-worth bracket
Ancient Magic Scroll leaves the shelf.
Ask anything that weighs on your heart. A benevolent, non-denominational presence answers with kindness, love, and support. No judgment, ever.
Ask the divine anything. A benevolent, non-denominational AI oracle answers with kindness, love, and support.
bg-brand-surface hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-x-0.5 active:translate-y-0.5 active:shadow-neo-pressed cursor-pointer
Blow into your mic to inflate it. Tie it off before it pops.
Blow into your microphone to inflate a balloon on screen — the harder you blow, the faster it fills. Tie it off in time to bank it, or keep blowing past full and watch it explode.
Blow into your microphone to inflate the balloon — the harder you blow, the faster it fills. Tie it off before it bursts to bank a balloon. Keep blowing past full and it explodes.
Blue calm. Moves like it's underwater and in no hurry.
Blue is a primary — cool, calm, the slow side of the wheel.
Brush it, press to flatten it, double-tap to pluck a blade — or grab the watering can and help it grow.
Bubbling Potion Flask leaves the shelf.
Built different. Fast, relentless, terrifyingly aligned.
Built purely for fun — it is a novelty entertainment site, not a tool, product, or service.
Canvas wiped. The potatoes pretend not to be offended.
Capture your face and match it to photos of you elsewhere
Care shapes color: a music-fed aura overrides its base hue.
Carry shells home to build a safe den.
Catch documents, screens, or reflections in view
Catch prey to grow. Ambush from your camouflage.
Change musical style — same sequence, different song
Chaos on a COOL aura stays reserved — same energy, less talking.
Chaos on a GREEN aura: nature, but make it caffeinated.
Chaos on a WARM aura keeps the energy high — and very suspicious.
Chaos scrambles the mix — color theory politely leaves the room.
Click the lock / tune icon at the left of the address bar.
Combined totals from every goblin who has ever scrolled through. Every blade plucked, egg laid, and answer received — counted forever.
Cookies help websites remember you between visits. Come back later and watch this count climb.
Cool and chaotic. Arms crossed. Says nothing. Nods slowly.
Cool colors + lots of rest = slow, mellow, flappy energy.
Could not create a match. Try again.
Could not load the shared clip. Default button restored.
Custom button armed. Preview it, save it, or smash it now.
CUSTOM SPELL EXPIRED. DEFAULT BUTTON RESTORED.
Decoupled monorepo / React + TS shell / Hono API / Vercel AI SDK (Gemini)
Do I need to download or install anything?
Does it involve ads, crypto, or payments?
Does Scroll Goblin cost anything or require an account?

Drag (or use WASD / arrows) to swim. Stay still to camouflage — predators see you from closer when you're hidden. Tap, click, or press Space to release ink and escape. Survive your way from hatchling to guardian.
Drag a spud from the tray and drop it on the canvas to stamp it. Every potato you use is replaced by a brand-new one — same variety, never the same shape.
Drift up to the bright surface currents.

Drip Red, Yellow & Blue energy into the jar, then raise the blob with care. Warm colors grow fast and dance hard; cool ones stay smooth. Harvest a ripe aura and your goblin erupts into a dance chosen by its color.
Drop a potato here to stamp it
Duel the AI or send a friend a link. First slug to the target score wins.
Each tile shows roughly how many people share your value — the rarer it is, the more it singles you out. Combine a few rare ones and you're trivial to pick out of a crowd.

Educational simulation. Real per-sale prices for one person run from fractions of a cent up to roughly $0.50; these figures are illustrative, scaled by the same criteria (engagement, device, market, location, re-identifiability) that data brokers use.
Educational simulation. The Goblin kept all of this on your device and sent none of it anywhere.
Equal red + yellow + blue cancels into neutral — true balance is rare.
Even estimate your heart rate from skin-color changes
Even what you type, from the sound of your keystrokes
Everything runs in your web browser; nothing to download or install.
Extended codes — rare & ambiguous residues that complete the alphabet
Finally, a way to touch grass without going outside. Brush it, pat it, pluck it — it reacts.
Find another octopus. Approach, then hold to display your colors.
Free to use — no account, sign-up, login, or email required.
From your language setting — many people use English abroad.
From your timezone. A VPN or manual clock can fool this.
FULL! Tie it off now — keep blowing and it'll explode!
Global leaderboard of the most-visited and most-poked Scroll Goblin mini-apps.
Glug glug. The grass drinks happily. 💧
GPS coordinates are far more precise than a city. From them, a website could look up your street address, and from that address typically dig up:
Grab a spud, drag it onto the canvas, and stamp masterpieces. Every potato you use grows back different.
Green and chaotic. Claw hands. No touching grass.
Green is a SECONDARY — yellow mixed with blue.
Grow it. Harvest it. Watch it dance
Guard your eggs. Stay close. Drive away anything that comes.
Guesses, not facts. Notice the bottom one: your age, gender, and income can't be read from your device at all — those come from data brokers, not your browser.
Half asleep. Reacts late and lunges lazily.
Heavy Crystal Ball leaves the shelf.
Here's what you just avoided handing over:
Hold down on the chicken to squeeze the air out. Release and it screams its way back into shape. Deeper squeeze, bigger scream.
How do I take {label} access back?
How do the AI-powered apps work?
Identify your surroundings — home, office, car, in bed
Inaudible ultrasonic beacons in ads that link your phone to your TV
Inferred from CPU cores and memory the browser reports.
Is it time to let go?
It lost you in your camouflage.
Learn your timezone and daily rhythm from when you open them
Let the Goblin call you back even after you leave.
Let the Goblin listen to your surroundings (stays on your device).
Let the Goblin look through your camera (stays on your device).
Let the Goblin pinpoint where you physically are.
Links to public records, voter rolls, and social profiles
Local Storage can remember far more than cookies, and websites reach for it constantly.
Mic blocked. Allow microphone access in your browser, then tap Start blowing again.
Mic blocked. Allow microphone access, then try again.

Mix colored energy into a jarred aura blob, raise it with feeding, rest, sunlight, music and pure chaos, then harvest it onto your goblin — who erupts into a dance picked by your color. Sneaky color-theory lessons, extremely dumb dances.
Most octopuses are eaten long before adulthood. That's the ocean — and it's biologically honest.
Neighborhood demographics and places you likely visit
Nice — balloon banked! A fresh one drifts in.
No ads, no crypto, no wallet, no payments, and no tracking beyond basic anonymous visit counts.
No audio was captured. Try again.
No device signal reveals these. Advertisers only 'know' them by buying your cross-site history from data brokers — which this page never has.
No. Every app is free to use with no account, sign-up, login, or email required.
No. Everything runs in your web browser; nothing to download or install.
No. There are no ads, no crypto, no wallet, and no payments — only basic anonymous visit counts.
Notice how each permission hands me a brand-new sense. Saying no is always a valid move — that's the whole point.
Once in a life, you search for another. Few octopuses ever meet one.
Only 1% of octopuses reach adulthood. Can you?
Orange is a SECONDARY — red mixed with yellow.
Overfed on pure chaos until it collapsed into the floor.
Overfilled Iron Cauldron leaves the shelf.
per sale — and a profile is sold over and over.
Perfect balance of all three primaries. Naturally, it flosses.
Pick up a potato and drop it on the canvas.
Pile on enough chaos and the aura forgets which way is up.
Ping you any time — even after you close the tab or browser
Play as an orange cat with one goal: shove everything off the shelf. Heavy mugs, magic junk, and squeaky toys all fall differently.
POP. An egg?! You squeezed an entire egg out of the chicken.
Powered by an LLM. Pick a direction, choose a language, and go.
Press and hold anywhere on the chicken — release to scream
Property records: owner, value, and purchase date
Pure red passion. The goblin is FIRED UP and has feelings about it.
Purple is a SECONDARY — red mixed with blue.
Raised on bedtime stories until it drifted into space.
Raised on nothing but music. Point up. Point down. Repeat forever.
Re-bait you for months to juice engagement numbers
Read your expression to infer mood or attention
Record your own button voice, save it, and share a spell that expires before it gets too powerful.
Recording is not supported in this browser.
Recording is too large. Keep it under {value0}.
Recording saved. Share link is ready.
Recording... say it like the universe owes you money.
Red + Blue mystery. Definitely casting something.
Red + Yellow confidence. Believes it could absolutely fight a bear.
Red is a primary — warm, loud, impossible to ignore.
Roughly 1 in {value0} people share a device profile like yours ({value1} bits of entropy).

Scroll Goblin is a free collection of silly, interactive browser toys powered by AI. Each mini-app does one absurd thing well — there is nothing to install and nothing to learn. Just open one and start poking.
Scroll Goblin is a free collection of silly, interactive browser toys powered by AI. Each mini-app does one absurd thing well, with nothing to install and nothing to learn.
See who else is in the room with you
See? I can tap you on the shoulder whenever I like.
Set it to Block or Ask, then reload the page.
Shared custom button loaded. Smash it.
Show the {length} technical signals the Goblin also used
Sink down to the seafloor — and survive the open water.
Smart. You kept that from me — exactly the right instinct.
Smash a giant button for instant affirmation, then record your own dramatic version and share it for seven chaotic days.
Someone shared their chicken stats with you. Think you can do better?
Someone shared their patch of grass with you. Treat it well.
Someone shared their potato art with you. Add your own spuds!
Sound is muted. The button is judging silently.
Speech turned to text: topics, names, even your mood
Spud acquired. Drop it where you want it!
Squeak. The cat looks personally betrayed.
Stack of Heavy Spellbooks leaves the shelf.
Stamped! A fresh potato has rolled into its place. 🥔
Standard 20 — the amino acids your DNA codes for
Storytelling pulled this aura cool and dreamy regardless of mix.
String together amino acids and hit play. The sequence picks a key, scale, tempo, and chord progression — so every protein becomes its own little song. Same sequence always sounds the same.
String together amino acids and listen to the song they encode. Same sequence, same tune — every protein gets its own key, mood, and groove.
Suspicious Little Safe leaves the shelf.
Tap “Start blowing”, then blow into your mic to inflate the balloon.
Tap residues below, type/paste a sequence, or load a preset.
Tap the object once for each cat swat. Heavier targets need more paws.
Tap the objects once for each cat swat. Heavier targets need more paws — shove them off the shelf to rack up chaos and level up your increasingly buff cat.
Technically not a potato. Don't tell it.
That match link is invalid or full.
The AI-powered apps (Emoji Translator, Commune with God) send your input to a language model and return a playful response.
The chicken is mostly flat now. It remembers everything.
The chicken is trembling. Something is happening in there...
The chicken regards you with suspicion.
The Goblin can reach you now
The Goblin does none of this. Your location never leaves this page — nothing is sent anywhere.
The Goblin never actually does this — and nothing leaves your device.
The Goblin only measures brightness and motion, live. Nothing is captured or sent.
The Goblin only measures loudness, live. Nothing is recorded, transcribed, or sent.
The Government Urn has appeared. Ten clean paws decide everything.
The grass has never looked greener. It's thriving!
The grass sways gently under your hand. 🍃
The open water is full of mouths. Reach the seafloor where you can hide.
The potato rolls back to the tray, unused.
The room expired or could not be reached.
The rune stone detonates. Worth it.
The shared custom clip expired, so the default is back.
The stats database isn't connected yet, so everything reads zero. (API is missing its Upstash Redis credentials.)
These look like gibberish to you — and that's the point. Your GPU, canvas drawing, and installed fonts are exactly what make your device stand out from the crowd.
This browser does not support recording.

This describes a type of device, not a proven one-of-a-kind machine. Many signals overlap (a phone model locks its screen, GPU and fonts together), so we discount for that — desktops vary a lot and trend unique, while phones cluster and are far less identifying. It's an estimate from all {length} signals above, calibrated against public research (EFF Panopticlick, AmIUnique). A precise figure would need a live database of real visitors — which would mean sending your data off-device, so the Goblin won't.
This page doesn't exist. The goblin probably ate it.
Tie a push subscription to your device as a semi-permanent ID

Too much and you'll get a Disco Aura
Too pooped to lunge. Let the meter refill.
Totals update within about a minute. Stats are anonymous — nobody knows it was you who squeezed the chicken 4,000 times.
Track which alerts you click to profile what lures you back
Translate between human language and emoji in both directions, powered by an LLM.
TV or music in the background — the media you consume
Type a sentence to turn into emoji...
Unabridged Tax Code leaves the shelf.
Waiting for your answer in the browser prompt...
Warm colors + sunlight = the fastest-growing, most energetic auras.
Warm, chaotic, and sprinting from imaginary auditors.
Websites infer who you are from behavior alone — no name required. These metrics update live.

What does the internet know about you? A goblin scans your device, remembers your visits, and infers who you are — then proves that deleting cookies isn't enough. Educational, slightly unsettling, runs entirely on your device.
What does the internet know about you? Everything below runs on your device only — the Goblin sends nothing to any server.

What I know, remember, and guessed
Whether you're alone or others are nearby (multiple voices)
Will things work out for me?
Yellow + Blue serenity. Wants to hug everything, especially trees.
Yellow is a primary — the brightest, happiest hue on the wheel.
Yellow joy, no notes. Cannot stop bouncing.
You and thousands of siblings hatch at once and rush for the surface. Almost none survive the gauntlet. Let the current carry you up.
You have learned to hunt. Stay still, blend in, then strike.
You hit the Chaos button too much. This is your fault.
You patted the grass. It appreciates the attention.
You plucked a blade! It'll grow back... eventually. 🌿
You will hatch. You will hunt. You will hide. You will love. You will die.
You will lay thousands of eggs — and never eat again. Guard them to the end.
You're on {value0} / {value1} — a {value2} in {summaryLocation}, reading in {value3}.
You're really pressing into it now. The grass forgives you.
Your browser blocked playback. Tap once more.
Your cookies are gone. Your Local Storage is gone. But your device fingerprint remains. Clearing storage doesn't make you anonymous — your device itself is identifying.
Your home address and who else lives there
Your setting — quiet home, busy office, car, or street
Your slug always fights on your dominant side.
Your slug will train harder. Here's a tiny dumbbell.
